mechanical_correction.reason: V0.8 incorrectly imposed a 20-row canonical floor despite the user's explicit instruction to materialize every real post-listing Yahoo row.
mechanical_correction.only_change: A valid 1-19-session Yahoo daily history is canonical-preservable but automatically crosscheck_status=UNRESOLVED due insufficient history, regardless of apparent agreement; it remains strategy-ineligible and counts toward the global unresolved limit.
mechanical_correction.zero_valid_yahoo_rows: INPUT_BLOCKED because no canonical history exists.
mechanical_correction.global_unresolved_gate: More than 5 unresolved symbols is INPUT_BLOCKED; 5 or fewer may publish.

inherited.universe: Frozen 50 companies and 50 stock lines plus SPY/XLG, identity SHA256 b7d74d1d92fef41b2d685397d4f369be5379c6cf774bed7681fbe882cb5f036f.
inherited.canonical: Yahoo explicit-period daily raw OHLCV plus adjclose, every real post-listing row.
inherited.crosscheck: Pinned Sina num=120; no fusion. >=60 histories need >=60 common and >98%; 20-59 histories need >=20 common and >98%; 1-19 histories are UNRESOLVED.
inherited.marking: Existing metadata quality_status/description and bar quality_status/conflict_flags_json only; no schema migration.
inherited.publication: Full 52-symbol staging, unresolved<=5, isolated-copy append/replay/conflict rejection, exact backup, one bounded central two-table publication and receipt.
inherited.strategy: Only QUALIFIED stock lines with t-252 availability; same 12-1/top10/rank15/cost/benchmark/PASS gates; one run.
